title: Tensura: Unique Skills as Items
description: If your Hosting a Server and are Wondering "Damn, I wish I could assemble a quest system that rewards players Skills", but cant figure out commands? Utilize These Items Instead, functioning the Same as the Original Buttons!
body:
The Tensura: Unique Skills as Items mod adds the original button items that when right clicked provided the player a skill and were consumned. Intended to be Used on Servers with Quest Systems as these are ONLY available in Creative originally.

- Tokens can simply be used via right click, consumning the token and receiving the correlated skill from Tensura!

![Tokens Displayed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3790cb331cc5a56c6103f11c7ef3f2961c8295c2.png)

This mod Since update 2.0.0 Includes 3d Models of Spirit Dolls as well, providing users the chance to obtain Greater Spirits through whatever method you manage to procure them.
![Spirit Dolls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e77c132c86df1f543046c8402052649f6cf7051_0.webp)

Update 2.0.2 added compatability with the tensura:ragnaorkraces addon. Enjoy yourselves
